name: job-radar
description: AI-powered personal job search agent. Tracks new postings daily, scored by relevance to your profile, organized in a Kanban board.

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.build: cd server && npm install && npx prisma generate && cd ../client && npm install && npm run build
scripts.start: cd server && npx prisma migrate deploy && npm start

author: Tawfeek Masalha
